_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to config/commands.local.json to add your own Telegram slash commands.
The gateway merges these with its built-in core commands at runtime, so your additions
survive `git pull` and never need editing the tracked source. The real file is gitignored.
Each command maps a Telegram /cmd to an ogmactl subcommand. ogmactl (and your gitignored
ogmactl.local) still gate execution, so listing a command here can't run anything ogmactl
cmd  - the Telegram command name, without the slash. Telegram allows only [a-z0-9_], max 32.
run  - the ogmactl subcommand to execute (hyphens allowed, e.g. 'pihole-stats').
desc - short text shown in the / menu and /help.
menu - true to surface it in Telegram's / menu (false = works when typed, but hidden).
args - optional usage hint shown in /help, e.g. '<dur>' or '<mac> <person>'.
